description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 2 implementation cluster. Pins docs-first library work apart from test-first development and unknown-cause debugging.

cases.prompt: Wire up file uploads through the storage SDK — multipart, size limits, signed URLs.
cases.reason: Feature implementation against an external SDK surface — version pinning and doc reading are the governing discipline.

cases.prompt: Build the rate-limit calculator test-first — I want to see the failing tests before any implementation.
cases.reason: Explicit test-first request makes tdd-engineer the outer loop; docs-first governs only the library-syntax step inside it if one arises.

cases.prompt: Uploads started failing with 403s sometime last week and nobody knows why.
cases.reason: Unknown-cause failure needs reproduce→isolate diagnosis first; docs-first may be handed the fix once the cause is a library API matter.

cases.prompt: The build says 'createRoot is not exported' after I wrote the mount code the usual way — sort out the right API for what we actually have installed.
cases.reason: The cause is already visible as version drift; the remedy is pin-and-read-docs, not a full diagnostic loop.
